title: olearia laxiflora
intro: Olearia laxiflora, also known as the spreading tree daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia laxiflora include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
